title: A small studio making a quieter kind of app.

story.p1: iRoly started in 2024 as a tiny side project: a place to color without ads, leaderboards, or a daily streak shaming you back into the app.
story.p2: Today we're a studio of six — three illustrators, two engineers, one cat — releasing four to six new books a month. We pay our artists per spread, not per royalty crumb.
story.p3: We believe coloring is a doorway to quiet attention. The app is the doorway. The books are the room.

rules.title: No streaks, no nags
rules.desc: You should never feel guilty for closing the app. We don't track returning users in our marketing.

rules.title: Pay our artists fairly
rules.desc: Every illustrator gets paid per spread, plus residuals when their book hits trending.

rules.title: One-time pricing forever
rules.desc: No subscriptions. No 'Pro tier' unlocked behind a paywall. ¥9.9 is ¥9.9.

rules.title: Calm beats viral
rules.desc: We design for the 9pm couch crowd. Loud confetti animations are not it.

appCta.heading: Color anywhere with the iRoly app.
appCta.body: Download on iOS or Android and take your pages with you.
